title: Crossbow Shotgun II
description: Makes crossbows look and sound like shotguns
body:
It makes crossbows look like shotguns
Sometimes makes fighting pillagers and piglins more intense
The item has been renamed to "Shotgun" and all subtitles have been replaced
As this is a resource pack, the crafting recipe is not changed

Sound effects from freesound.org and Half Life from Valve
